📲 WhatsApp Invoice Dispatcher 5B-2-B
Auto-convert billing nodes to Digital Invoice links and dispatch via WhatsApp on every save
⚡ Auto-Trigger on Save (per module)
🎁 Gift Orders
Trigger on saveGiftOrder() — sends Digital Invoice link
🖼️ Frame Orders
Trigger on saveFrameOrder() — sends Digital Invoice link
🖨️ Xerox Bills
Trigger on saveXBill() — sends bill confirmation + inv link
🎨 Studio Bookings
Trigger on saveStudioBooking() — sends booking confirmation
🖊️ Stationery Bills
Trigger on saveStnBill() — sends itemised bill summary
🔗 Include Digital Invoice URL
Append ?inv=TOKEN link in every outbound WA message
📲 WhatsApp Invoice Dispatcher 5B-2-B
Webhook listener structure — converts billing nodes into Digital Invoice URLs dispatched via WhatsApp

🛍️
Welcome to Roaji.in!
Let's set up your workspace in 3 quick steps
Step 1 of 3 — Shop Information
Step 2 of 3 — Business Type
Select all modules that apply to your shop. Unselected modules will be hidden.
Step 3 of 3 — You're Almost Ready!
✅ Your workspace will be set up with starter stock items for your selected modules. Ready to go immediately!
After setup, you can try the Instant Demo Check-Bill to see a beautiful sample invoice in action.

📤 Universal Data Export Engine
One-click export of all live data — inventory, billing logs, configurations — as structured JSON or CSV. Fully migration-ready for any database server.
📄 JSON Export
Structured JSON — ideal for API/database migration
📊 CSV Export
Flat CSV sheets — compatible with Excel/Sheets/SQL
Export Tables included:
🎁 Gift Orders 🖼️ Frame Orders 🖨️ Xerox Bills 🎨 Studio Bookings 📦 Inventory 👤 Employees 💳 Credits 💰 Borrowed ⚙️ Settings
🔐 Active Session Guard
🧑‍💼
Worker Settings
Personal preferences — Admin controls are restricted
🎨 Theme
Theme is shared across the workspace. Use the theme toggle button in the header to cycle through available themes.
👤 Your Profile
🔒 Master controls, inventory pricing, user management, and data export are restricted to the Store Owner only.
🔐
Session Terminated
This Owner account has been authenticated on another device. Your session has been invalidated to prevent simultaneous access.

This is a security feature protecting your billing license.
📱 Mobile Barcode Scanner
Smartphone camera-ல் இந்த QR-ஐ scan செய்யவும்
⏳ Mobile connection-க்காக காத்திருக்கிறோம்...
🧾 GST Tax Profile Settings
இந்த profile GST calculation-க்கு use ஆகும். GSTIN மற்றும் Tax type (CGST/SGST or IGST) configure பண்ணவும்.
🖨️ Thermal Printer Settings
உங்கள் thermal printer size தேர்வு செய்யவும். Bill print time automatically correct width-ல் print ஆகும்.
⚙️ Terminal Control Settings Engine
Owner-level configuration hub — Shop · Security · Tax · Printer · WhatsApp
PART 3
Configuration
🏪 Shop Profile
Configure your business identity. These details appear on all printed bills, digital invoices, and WhatsApp messages.
Core Identity
Displayed on bill header and digital invoice
Customer-facing contact number on receipts
Full shop address printed on bill footer
Edit Permissions
Prevents back-dated order modifications after the chosen window
🔐 Security Settings
Manage owner credentials and configure the 4-digit PIN screen lock for kiosk-style access control.
Account Credentials
⚠️ Changing your email or password will apply immediately after saving. Ensure you remember the new credentials before committing.
Updates the owner login email in Firebase Auth
Password Change
4-Digit Security PIN
🔢 Set / Change 4-Digit Passcode
Enter all 4 digits · Leave blank to remove PIN
🔒 Enable PIN Screen Lock Mode
Require the 4-digit PIN on every app launch and after session timeout
📜 Tax Profiles
Configure GST compliance settings, tax regime, blended rate, and pricing rules. These values apply across all billing modules.
ℹ️ Changes here sync directly to the Phase 5A GST engine. Ensure GSTIN is verified before filing returns.
Store Compliance
15-character GST Identification Number · Leave blank if not registered
Applied as default rate when no item-level tax is defined
Tax Regime
Select Applicable Regime
Syncs to Phase 5A GST calculation engine for all modules
Pricing Rules
Determines how tax is calculated at billing — affects the bill breakdown display
🖨️ Printer Configurations
Select the thermal roll paper size for your POS printer and configure bill rendering options.
Thermal Roll Paper Size
The bill print engine will automatically use the correct column width and font size for the selected roll size.
Bill Rendering Options
📊 Render Barcode on Bill
Print a scannable barcode of the bill number on every receipt for quick lookup
🧾 Enforce Split Tax Value Breakdown
Show itemised CGST / SGST / IGST line-values in the tax section of every printed bill
💬 WhatsApp Automation
Configure the WhatsApp Dispatcher API infrastructure and control which billing modules auto-trigger invoice delivery.
🌐 The Domain Host URL is used to construct Digital Invoice deep-links embedded in every outgoing WhatsApp message.
API Infrastructure
Full URL to your app — used as base for ?inv= digital invoice link generation
Your shop's WhatsApp number — customers can reply to this number
Transaction Message Footer
Appended to every outgoing WhatsApp invoice message as a closing thank-you line
⚡ Automated Module Triggers
🎁 Gift Orders — Auto Trigger
Fire WhatsApp dispatch on every saveGiftOrder() — sends Digital Invoice link instantly
🖼️ Frame Orders — Auto Trigger
Fire WhatsApp dispatch on every saveFrameOrder() — sends framing confirmation with invoice
🖨️ Xerox Bills — Auto Trigger
Fire WhatsApp dispatch on every saveXBill() — sends bill confirmation + invoice link
🎨 Studio Bookings — Auto Trigger
Fire WhatsApp dispatch on every saveStudioBooking() — sends booking confirmation
